<!-- Thanks for contributing to glassy! Keep it focused and friendly. -->

## What & why

Briefly: what does this change, and why?

Fixes #<!-- issue number, if any -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Other:

## Checks

- [ ] `cargo build` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` applied
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] Updated docs / man page if behavior or flags changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out: tradeoffs, screenshots for visual changes, follow-ups
you're deferring, etc.
